documents.title: Database relationship overview
documents.content:
Relationship overview for the connected database:
employee_privileges:
- join employee_privileges.employee_id with employees.id.
- join employee_privileges.privilege_id with privileges.id.
inventory_transactions:
- join inventory_transactions.transaction_type with inventory_transaction_types.id.
- join inventory_transactions.customer_order_id with orders.id.
- join inventory_transactions.product_id with products.id.
- join inventory_transactions.purchase_order_id with purchase_orders.id.
invoices:
- join invoices.order_id with orders.id.
orders:
- join orders.customer_id with customers.id.
- join orders.employee_id with employees.id.
- join orders.status_id with orders_status.id.
- join orders.tax_status_id with orders_tax_status.id.
- join orders.shipper_id with shippers.id.
order_details:
- join order_details.status_id with order_details_status.id.
- join order_details.order_id with orders.id.
- join order_details.product_id with products.id.
purchase_orders:
- join purchase_orders.created_by with employees.id.
- join purchase_orders.status_id with purchase_order_status.id.
- join purchase_orders.supplier_id with suppliers.id.
purchase_order_details:
- join purchase_order_details.inventory_id with inventory_transactions.id.
- join purchase_order_details.product_id with products.id.
- join purchase_order_details.purchase_order_id with purchase_orders.id.
